title: More helpful error message on Enum <-> Instantiation name collision

features.name: enum_element_instantiation_name_collision
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where the instance name collides with an enum element name defined in the instantiated module
features.snippet:
module CPU(input logic clk); S s1(clk); endmodule

module S(input clk); enum {s0, s1} state; endmodule
